candidatePool.description: Players from the daily HR model with at least one at-bat across their previous five completed games. The page defaults to at least three at-bats across the previous two games.

dailyProfile.interpretation: Universal Day 21 and Calendar Day 22 emphasize root-3 and root-4 qualities. Players with birth-day or jersey alignment to 21, plus Life Path or Expression roots in the primary 3-6-9 family, show the strongest structural overlap.

narrative.closingObservation: Birth-day matches to 21 dominate the slate while countercurrent signals remain isolated.
